calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion (Motions)
Off Calendar Mar-07-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Qardio, Inc.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiff: Deputy Park; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:26:50 a.m. and concluding at 9:34:00 a.m. (D505)

Michael Pellegrini, Esq. representing Plaintiff Daniel Grasparini, who was placed under oath and testified via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Qardio, Inc. not appearing.

Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract filed July 22, 2024.
Proof of substituted service filed Sept. 17, 2024.
Default entered on Oct. 24, 2024.
Defendants Does dismissed on Dec. 4, 2024.

Counsel provides a brief summary and an offer of proof.
Plaintiff confirms statements and declaration made are true and correct.
Counsel confirms that the requested judgment will resolve the entire case.

Good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant:
Damages $200,000.00
Interest $34,575.34
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $1,070.57
Total Judgment $235,645.91

Proposed judgment as amended signed and executed this day.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2024 Continued To May-07-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
